mapper.select:
SELECT t.device_id AS deviceId, t.entity_name AS entityName, c.attribute_name AS dynamicPropertyName, ST_X(o.geom) AS longitude, ST_Y(o.geom) AS latitude FROM twin_entity t LEFT JOIN entity_static_observation o ON t.entity_id = o.entity_id LEFT JOIN entity_control_attribute c ON t.entity_id = c.entity_id WHERE t.device_id IN
#{id}
